testsuite.name: Storage Layer Integration

testcase.name: should track operations and cleanup correctly
should fail recovery when too many shards are lost
should perform full async ingest and retrieve cycle with progress
should recover from partial shard loss using erasure coding

testsuite.system-out: On-The-Fly Repair logic successfully resolved and persisted missing shard for chunk: e5cba699dba5bdc44deae93b9e1ddb666d9fd2f6a7f263acc2657ec1792f0bd7 On-The-Fly Repair logic successfully resolved and persisted missing shard for chunk: 6f2d3f837546639ad5a404ea8f4de0dd10cfc671a268256d6619bd0bfc408401
